_comment: Dynamic README metrics from gitignored or volatile sources (fallow health score, Vitest line/branch coverage, source LOC, inline-suppression counts, built content.js size). Refreshed by `pnpm gen:readme --refresh`, which `pnpm metrics` runs after fallow + coverage + the content-bundle guard; committed so the README guard recomputes the badge block without running any tool, and so unrelated commits don't drift it. Truly-static metrics (permissions, license) and live-verified promises are computed in scripts/gen-readme-metrics.mts and are NOT stored here.
